zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Lunsford於大約1446年出生在英國時，她的父親Sir William Lunsford27歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Whalesborough25歲。她於1465年與Sir John Thomas Dearth在英國英格蘭肯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1500年9月5日在英國諾福爾可享年55歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可易亞斯特 雷納姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Lunsford于大约1446年出生在英国时，她的父亲Sir William Lunsford27岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Whalesborough25岁。她于1465年与Sir John Thomas Dearth在英国英格兰肯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1500年9月5日在英国諾福爾可享年55岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可易亞斯特 雷納姆。

nameMeanings.name: Lunsford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Lundsford in East Sussex, so named from an Old English personal name Lundrǣd + Old English ford ‘ford’.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Lunsford was born about 1446, in England, her father, Sir William Lunsford, was 27 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Whalesborough, was 25. She married Sir John Thomas Dearth in 1465, in Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 5 September 1500, in Norfolk, England, at the age of 55, and was buried in East Raynham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Lunsford est née environ 1446, à Angleterre, son père, Sir William Lunsford, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Whalesborough, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Thomas Dearth en 1465, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 5 septembre 1500, à Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à East Raynham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

Sie hat 1465 in Kent, England, United Kingdom Sir John Thomas Dearth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 5. September 1500 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Norfolk, England und wurde in East Raynham, Norfolk, England begraben.

Lei sposato Sir John Thomas Dearth nel 1465, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 5 settembre 1500, nel Norfolk, England, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a East Raynham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Lunsfordが約1446年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir William Lunsfordは27歳，母Lady Elizabeth Whalesboroughは25歳であった。1465年にイギリスイギリスケントでSir John Thomas Dearthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1500年9月5日にイギリスノーフォルクで55歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクエアスト レインハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Lunsford(이)가 대략 1446년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Lunsford(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Whalesborough(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 Sir John Thomas Dearth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1500년 9월 5일 영국 노르폴크에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 이스트 라이함에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir John Thomas Dearth em 1465, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Lunsford родилась около 1446 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Lunsford было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Whalesborough, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Thomas Dearth в 1465 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 5 сентября 1500 г. в местности норфолк, Англия в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности эаст реинам, норфолк, Англия.
